response.overview: "3' The movie is about an artist/art teacher played by Caleb Ruminer who has lost his ability to create art, lost his father, and lost his job. Suddenly, he ﬁnds out from a mysterious stranger played by Eric Roberts that he is going to lose his life in 3 days. This all happens just as he meets the person who could be the love he has been longing for years, played by Anna Grace Barlow. Haunted by dreams from the past and fear of what is to come, he faces and struggles with the inevitability that everyone must eventually face in this world.
response.title: 3: The Movie
